originalTitle: Building a High-Performance mini-MOBA for Reinforcement Learning
title: Refactoring PufferLib Config System and Prototyping a Mini-MOBA Environment
summary: Refactored the PufferLib demo configuration system from YAML to Python configparser, reducing demo.py length by a third. Began developing a high-performance mini-MOBA environment using the continuous control engine with a DOTA-inspired map, struct-based entities, towers, and basic combat, while also integrating hyperparameter sweeps using WanB and carbs.
